name: U.S. Bank Altitude® Connect Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: 20,000 bonus points after spending $2,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.category: Prepaid Hotels and Car Rentals (Travel Center)
earning_rates.notes: 5x points on prepaid hotels and car rentals booked directly in Travel Center
4x points on travel (airlines, hotels, car rentals) purchased directly
4x points at gas stations and EV charging stations
1x point per $1 on all other purchases

annual_credits.name: Priority Pass Select
annual_credits.description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership with 4 free lounge visits per year

annual_credits.name: TSA PreCheck/Global Entry credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 statement credit for TSA PreCheck or Global Entry application fee

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 coverage for stolen/damaged cell phones

notes: No annual fee with Priority Pass lounge access (4 visits). $100 credit for TSA PreCheck/Global Entry. Strong 4x on travel and gas.
